name: AI image generator from text with content safety filtering
description: Takes a text prompt, runs content safety classification with Claude AI to filter inappropriate requests, generates a detailed image description and creative brief, delivers the results via Gmail, and notifies Slack.

source.originalName: AI image generator from text built on fal.ai

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for delivering results

prompt.description: Text description of the image to generate

style.description: Image style: photorealistic, illustration, 3d-render, watercolor, pencil-sketch

recipientEmail.description: Email to send the image brief to

steps.name: Run content safety check with Claude AI
